name: VCBBoardSizeModifier
description: Resize the Virtual Circuit Board board past the default 2048x2048. Adds a toolbar 'Board' button opening a small window with a single Board size field and an Apply button (boards are square). Range 2048-8192; existing content is preserved. The board texture (grid + ink-symbol overlay) grows with the board, and drawing on a large board stays fast: only the changed region is re-uploaded, and the full-board prepass renders on demand while editing instead of every frame. The board size is saved inside .vcb projects (via a generic 'modded' section) so grown boards reopen grown. Compatible with the VCB Multiplayer mod - the size field is mirrored to the other player live as you type, Apply resizes both boards, and a late joiner is resized to the host's board.
